About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long ADTTF dominates today's rankings at position #1 with a score of 94.5, displaying exceptional long-term momentum across all timeframes—particularly its 8,799% 10-year return and 667% 5-year return that dramatically outpace SPY by 8,531% and 592% respectively. The ticker maintains perfect technical positioning with all four moving averages (SMA 30/50/100/200) in bullish alignment, though its momentum signal of -0.05 remains clean with no pullback warning. ATEX ranks second with extreme near-term volatility, posting 354% 6-month returns but showing a deteriorating ratio structure (ratio_1y_6m of 0.85 and ratio_5y_1y of only 0.22) that suggests recent gains may not reflect sustained secular strength. The stark contrast between ADTTF's consistent multi-year outperformance and ATEX's sharp near-term spike indicates the ranker is identifying very different momentum profiles—ADTTF as a stable long-term winner versus ATEX as a momentum spike that weakens at longer horizons.
